summary: 3 of 4 holes patched: (1) NPxy opening softened — 'same family of NOAA pole-position products' with explicit NP.xy/WMM split; (2) WIN-007 'acceleration target' → 'target number'; (3) WIN-022 'no entry' → 'no dedicated entry — Domain #11 shared with WIN-007'.
